name: zotero-mcp
description: MCP server + CLI for Zotero local library with PaddleOCR integration

scripts.plugin:pack: mkdir -p dist-plugin && rm -f dist-plugin/zotero-mcp-local-bridge.xpi && cd zotero-local-bridge && zip -q -r ../dist-plugin/zotero-mcp-local-bridge.xpi manifest.json bootstrap.js
